description: The World Close Screen component is used in the dash and appears when the user asks to close a world. This acts as a conformation. This is also an internally used component.

fields.Icon: The icon for this dialogue screen.
fields.ActiveColor: The color when this screen is selected and active.
fields.Label: The label of this dash screen.
fields.ScreenEnabled: Whether this dash screen is enabled or not.
fields.BaseResolution: The resolution this screen renders at.
fields._screenRoot: The root slot of this screen's visual elements.
fields._screenCanvas: The canvas Component used to render this dash screen.
fields._modalOverlayManager: This is the Overlay manager that handles editing mode on this screen.
fields._button: This is the button to switch to viewing this screen.
fields._iconTexture: This is the texture Component showing the icon for the tab of this screen.
fields._closeDialog: The close dialog this is controlling.

usage: Not used by the user, is an internally used component.
